title: The Best of Intentions
excerpt: Well, it was a lofty goal to have a blog post every day in December. I doubt that too many of you were disappointed in the lack of a post yesterday, but if you were, my apologies. I realize that…
body:
Well, it was a lofty goal to have a blog post every day in December. I doubt that too many of you were disappointed in the lack of a post yesterday, but if you were, my apologies. I realize that it's good to have goals in mind, and it's even better to achieve them, but sometimes it's just not realistic. Will do my best to post on most days and hopefully create a habit of updating even more often next year. And since I haven't gotten into the habit of sending out holiday cards (though I love receiving them!), I posted this photo from JC's work party on Saturday night.

We had a ball. Really enjoyed reading all your comments about your weekend plans. Thanks for all the comments - winner of the Allison Kreft collection posted here.
